failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation or impurities in the reaction mixture
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular filtration and monitoring of feed solvent

failure_modes.cause: Mechanical failure or blockage of the BPR
failure_modes.mitigation: Routine maintenance and inspection of pressure relief systems

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=10.96701 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct a blockage test by introducing a known impurity and monitoring flow rate
Perform a pressure relief valve functionality test under simulated operational conditions
